name: Team Planner Snapshot
subject: Team Plan: {project_name} ({date})
body:
Dear Team,

Attached is the current Team Planner snapshot for {project_name} as of {date}.

This view shows all resource assignments across the project timeline, enabling you to see workload distribution and identify periods of over- or under-allocation at a glance.

Please review your scheduled activities and flag any conflicts to {project_manager} as soon as possible so adjustments can be made before the next planning cycle.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
body_html:
Dear Team,

Below is the current Team Planner snapshot for {project_name} as of {date}. The chart is also attached as an SVG file.

{svg_inline}

This view shows all resource assignments across the project timeline. Please review your scheduled activities and flag any conflicts to {project_manager} as soon as possible so adjustments can be made before the next planning cycle.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
